channel.title: Research Fixture
channel.description: High-impact bullish BTC/ETH items (macro + etf tags) for sentiment backtests

item.title: Bitcoin rally accelerates as Fed and CPI data support ETF approval inflow surge
item.description: Traders cite partnership deals and rate cut hopes as Powell commentary lifts BTC after record approval and rally momentum.

item.title: Ethereum surges on ETF inflow rally as FOMC holds and traders pile in
item.description: Strong approval narrative and partnership headlines lift ETH alongside Bitcoin amid interest rate optimism.
